c74object.name: dk.controllers
c74object.description: The dk.controllers object works in conjunction with dk.descriptors~ / dk.descriptorframe to create several meta-parameters based on loudness and centroid (brightness).
c74object.discussion:
If you want to learn more about the underlying algorithms have a look at these articles:
https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/loudness
https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/spectralshape

method.name: calibrate
method.description: Enables manual calibration of descriptor ranges.

method.name: reset
method.description: Resets manual calibration and returns to auto-calibration routine.

attribute.name: history
attribute.digest: Amount of values to compute on parameters on
attribute.description: Amount of values to compute on parameters on.

attribute.name: select
attribute.digest: Select a subset of descriptors to pass through
attribute.description: Allow only a subset of the descriptors to come out. A message of "select reset" will return everything to default.

attribute.name: default
attribute.value: loudness_normalized, loudness_mean, loudness_slope, loudness_variance, loudness_direction, centroid_normalized, centroid_mean, centroid_slope, centroid_variance, centroid_direction
